languages.text: "Вы ошибаетесь! Просто представьте, чего мы могли бы добиться вместе".
"You are wrong! Just imagine what we could achieve together."
languages.original_text: "Вы ошибаетесь! Просто представьте, чего мы могли бы добиться вместе".

traits.locale_text: "You are wrong! Just imagine what we could achieve together."
"You are wrong! Just imagine what we could achieve together."
"You are wrong! Just imagine what we could achieve together."
"You are wrong! Just imagine what we could achieve together."

languages.text: "Ihr irrt Euch! Stellt Euch vor, was wir gemeinsam erreichen könnten."
languages.original_text: "You are wrong! Just imagine what we could achieve together."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr irrt Euch! Stellt Euch vor, was wir gemeinsam erreichen könnten."

languages.text: « Vous avez tort ! Imaginez un instant ce que nous pourrions accomplir ensemble. »
languages.original_text: "You are wrong! Just imagine what we could achieve together."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez tort ! Imaginez un instant ce que nous pourrions accomplir ensemble. »

languages.text: «¡Se equivoca! Imagine lo que podríamos lograr juntos».
languages.original_text: "You are wrong! Just imagine what we could achieve together."

traits.locale_text: «¡Se equivoca! Imagine lo que podríamos lograr juntos».

languages.original_text: "You are wrong! Just imagine what we could achieve together."

languages.text: “你错了！想象一下，我们联手定能成就一番伟业。”
languages.original_text: "You are wrong! Just imagine what we could achieve together."

traits.locale_text: “你错了！想象一下，我们联手定能成就一番伟业。”

languages.text: 「あなたは間違っています！私たちが一緒に達成できることを想像してみてください。」
languages.original_text: "You are wrong! Just imagine what we could achieve together."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは間違っています！私たちが一緒に達成できることを想像してみてください。」
